message.content:
### 1) RENDERING  
The page renders correctly. No broken images, layout collapse, overlap, or console-style errors are visible. The error state is fully displayed without broken elements.  


### 2) VISIBLE ELEMENTS  
- **Header**: App logo ("AniStream"), search icon, notification bell, user profile icon.  
- **Error Icon**: Yellow warning triangle inside a brown circle.  
- **Error Message**: "Streaming source unavailable" (main title).  
- **Error Details**: "We couldn’t reach any of the configured anime streaming sources. All Consumet instances failed: No sources returned from consumet-api-eta.vercel.app; No sources returned from consumet-api-rose.vercel.app; HTTP 451 from api.consumet.org. Tried: consumet-api-eta.vercel.app, consumet-api-rose.vercel.app, api.consumet.org, consumet-api.vercel.app."  
- **Action Buttons**: "Retry" (purple, with refresh icon), "Switch provider" (white, with list icon).  
- **Episode Navigator**: "Episode 1 · Episode 1" (top-left of lower section).  
- **Source Selector**: "Koto" dropdown (top-right of lower section).  
- **Anime Info**: "Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba" (title), truncated synopsis, genre tags ("ADVENTURE", "DRAMA", "FANTASY").  


### 3) ERROR HANDLING QUALITY  
- **Clear, user-friendly error message**: PASS. The message is plain language ("Streaming source unavailable") instead of a stack trace or blank player.  
- **Explains why unavailable**: PASS. Details specify "Consumet instances failed" and lists failed URLs/HTTP errors (e.g., "HTTP 451 from api.consumet.org").  
- **Recovery affordance**: PASS. Two buttons ("Retry", "Switch provider") offer clear next steps.  
- **Consistent dark theme styling**: PASS. Black background, lavender accent (button borders/icons), and brown error icon align with Miruro’s dark theme.  


### 4) DESIGN MATCH to Miruro Goals  
PASS. The dark background (~#080808) and lavender accents (~#b5a8ff) are consistent. No default browser/HTML5 error chrome is visible—error styling is custom.  


### 5) VISUAL ISSUES  
- **Contrast**: PASS. Text (white/gray) contrasts well with the black background; the yellow error icon stands out against the brown circle.  
- **Alignment/Spacing**: PASS. Elements are centered vertically/horizontally; spacing between sections (error area, episode info) is balanced.  
- **Color/Typography**: PASS. Lavender buttons, brown error icon, and white text follow the theme; typography is legible (sans-serif, consistent sizing).  
- **Accessibility**: PASS. No obvious issues (e.g., low contrast, missing alt text for icons).  


### 6) OVERALL VERDICT  
The screen effectively communicates the streaming error with clear messaging, actionable recovery options, and consistent dark theme styling, meeting Miruro’s design and UX goals. The error state is user-friendly and visually aligned with the app’s aesthetic.
